| New feature?  | yes/no
| BC breaks?    | yes/no
| Deprecations? | yes/no
| Issues        | fixes #X, relates to #Y
| License       | MIT

- Renamed service IDs, container parameters, config keys, and changed public
  method signatures all count as BC breaks.
- Please add an entry to the "Unreleased" section of CHANGELOG.md for any
  user-visible change.
-->
